betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6RBMK Fuel Processing§f enables reprocessing of reactor waste.

§eProcess:§f
1. Use §bNuclear Waste Disposal Drum§f for waste decay
2. Process with §bSILEX§f for isotope separation
3. Extract valuable materials

§eProducts:§f
RBMK fuels yield many materials through reprocessing:
• Uranium isotopes
• Plutonium
• Rare elements (Technetium, Bismuth via SILEX)

§aTip:§f Don't waste spent RBMK fuel - it contains valuable materials.
